# zohomail_domain_onboarding (Resource)

Trigger Zoho Mail domain verification and post-verification onboarding actions.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "zohomail_domain" "example" {
  domain_name = "example.com"
}

resource "zohomail_domain_onboarding" "example" {
  domain_name         = zohomail_domain.example.domain_name
  verification_method = "txt"
  enable_mail_hosting = true
  verify_spf          = false
  verify_mx           = false
  make_primary        = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain_name` (String) Zoho Mail domain name to verify and onboard.
- `verification_method` (String) Verification method to trigger in Zoho Mail. Accepted values: `txt`, `cname`, `html`.

### Optional

- `enable_mail_hosting` (Boolean) Enable Zoho Mail hosting after domain verification.
- `make_primary` (Boolean) Mark the domain as the primary Zoho Mail domain after verification.
- `verify_mx` (Boolean) Ask Zoho Mail to verify MX records. Zoho can surface MX propagation asynchronously, so this flag may need a later apply after DNS has settled.
- `verify_spf` (Boolean) Ask Zoho Mail to verify the SPF DNS record. Zoho can surface SPF propagation asynchronously, so this flag may need a later apply after DNS has settled.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Onboarding identifier. Equal to `domain_name`.
- `is_primary` (Boolean) Whether the domain is primary after onboarding.
- `mail_hosting_enabled` (Boolean) Whether Zoho Mail hosting is enabled for the domain.
- `mx_status` (String) MX verification status reported by Zoho Mail.
- `spf_status` (String) SPF verification status reported by Zoho Mail.
- `verification_status` (String) Domain verification status reported by Zoho Mail.
